english translation text: Place the Quran on your head

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
O Allah, for the sake of this Qur’an,
for the sake of the one You sent with it,

arabic text: وَ بِحَقِّ كُلِّ مُؤْمِنٍ مَدَحْتَهُ فِيهِ
english translation text: for the sake of every believer You have praised in it,
and for the sake of Your right over them,
for none is more aware of Your right over them than Yourself.
Repeat the following 10 times
For Your sake, O Allah,
for the sake of Muhammad (s.a.w.),
for the sake of Ali (a.s.),
for the sake of Fatima (a.s.),
for the sake of Hasan (a.s.),
for the sake of Husayn (a.s.),
for the sake of Ali son of Husayn (a.s.),
for the sake of Muhammad son of Ali (a.s.),
for the sake of Ja`far son of Muhammad (a.s.),
for the sake of Musa son of Ja`far (a.s.),
for the sake of Ali son of Musa (a.s.),
for the sake of Muhammad son of Ali (a.s.),
for the sake of Ali son of Muhammad (a.s.),
for the sake of Hasan son of Ali (a.s.),
for the sake of al-Hujjat (the Proof) (a.s.)
Hajaat
